title: JIT IR translation — tuple and list operations
purpose: Translate heap-allocating opcodes (put_tuple2, put_list, get_tuple_element, get_list, get_hd, get_tl) to Cranelift IR using the GC safepoint infrastructure from B-134.
task: Implement IR translation for data construction and destructuring opcodes.

requirements.title: Tuple construction and access IR
requirements.spec: Translate put_tuple2 and get_tuple_element to IR with heap allocation.
acceptance: put_tuple2 calls jit_alloc_tuple, writes elements, produces tagged Term
get_tuple_element reads from tuple header + offset
Test: compiled function constructs and destructures tuples correctly

requirements.title: List construction and destructuring IR
requirements.spec: Translate put_list, get_list, get_hd, get_tl to IR.
acceptance: put_list calls jit_alloc_cons, writes head and tail
get_list/get_hd/get_tl read from cons cell memory
Test: compiled function builds and pattern-matches lists correctly

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement map construction in JIT — interpreter fallback
SHALL NOT implement binary construction in JIT — interpreter fallback
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
